message:
test(snapshots): update visual regression snapshots for new features

Regenerate all snapshot test files to reflect the enhanced demo showcase
with new screens, widgets, and theme integration.

Updated snapshots (18 files):
- app_advancedfeatures_80x24.snap
- app_codeexplorer_80x24.snap
- app_dashboard_80x24.snap, app_dashboard_full_120x40.snap
- app_dataviz_80x24.snap
- app_debug_overlay_120x40.snap
- app_filebrowser_80x24.snap
- app_formsinput_80x24.snap
- app_help_overlay_120x40.snap
- app_layoutlab_80x24.snap
- app_macrorecorder_80x24.snap
- app_markdownrichtext_80x24.snap
- app_performance_80x24.snap
- app_shakespeare_80x24.snap, app_shakespeare_full_120x40.snap
- app_visualeffects_80x24.snap
- app_widgetgallery_80x24.snap
- dashboard_initial_80x24.snap, dashboard_initial_120x40.snap

Changes reflect:
- New theme color tokens
- Updated dashboard metrics display
- Macro recorder screen content
- Badge widget in gallery
- Chrome header/footer updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
